alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a bond between a carbon atom and an oxygen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organooxygen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a nitrogen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organonitrogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Organic compounds containing a functional group with the general structure R1C(=S)R2 (R1, R2=H, alkyl, aryl).
class.name: Thiocarbonyl compounds

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as thiocarbamic acid esters. These are organic compounds containing a functional group with the general structure R1OC(=S)N(R2)R3 (R1=alkyl, aryl; R2,R3=H, alkyl, aryl).

direct_parent.description: Organic compounds containing a functional group with the general structure R1OC(=S)N(R2)R3 (R1=alkyl, aryl; R2,R3=H, alkyl, aryl).
direct_parent.name: Thiocarbamic acid esters

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organic compounds containing a functional group with the general structure OC(=S)NR2 or SC(=O)NR2.
subclass.name: Thiocarbamic acid derivatives

superclass.description: Organic compounds containing a carbon-sulfur bond.
superclass.name: Organosulfur compounds
